message:
feat(fp-frame): add value_counts_bins and pivot_table_multi_agg

- Series.value_counts_bins(n): bin numeric values into n equal-width
  intervals via cut() then count per bin
- DataFrame.pivot_table_multi_agg(values, index, columns, aggfuncs):
  apply multiple aggregation functions, producing columns named
  "{col}_{func}" for each combination

2 new tests, 838 total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
